enriched_points.expanded_content: Utilizing advanced AI techniques, such as neural networks, to improve the accuracy of land-use change predictions, integrating diverse data sources for better insights.
Implementing predictive models to inform sustainable land management strategies, ensuring optimal resource use while minimizing environmental impacts, aligning with global sustainability goals.
Leveraging model outputs to guide policymakers in crafting effective land use regulations, promoting informed decisions that balance development needs with ecological preservation.
